calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2008 Continued To Nov-26-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

William T. Webb, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Merrill Communications, L.L.C.
No appearance by defendant Wherify Wireless, Inc., a Delaware Corporation, f/k/a I.Q. Biometrix, Inc., a Delaware Corporation.
Amended Default was entered against defendant on September 9, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 8, 2008.
Order waiving the appearance of a witness at the default prove-up hearing was filed on October 6, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Merrill Communication, L.L.C., and against the Defaulted Defendant Wherify Wireless, Inc., a Delaware Corporation, f/k/a I.Q. Biometrix, Inc., a Delaware Corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal - $98,473.01.
Prejudgment Interest - $77,085.49.
Attorney's Fees - $16,260.00.
Costs - $560.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $192,379.00.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than October 10, 2008.

Amended Ntc For Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jun-25-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff Merrill Communications's application for right to attach order and writ of attachment is ordered off calendar, for failure to comply with California Rule of Court 3.1300 (c). Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ;Application
Off Calendar Jun-09-2008 Text Ruling
